title: Ukalari Menorca Live
description: A brand-new festival debuting in 2026, driven by the promoters of Ciutadella's Teatro Ukalari, at the Sporting Mahonès stadium from 12 to 22 August. It blends music, comedy and culture with tributes, rock, pop and urban music: performers include Juan Magán, OBK, La Guardia, Beret, The Tyets and Marlena, among others. Line-up indicative, confirm at the official source.
